title: T-018 — GET/POST /api/scheduler/changeover-matrix endpoints
prompt:
# T-018 — GET/POST /api/scheduler/changeover-matrix endpoints

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.2 GET/POST changeover-matrix, §7.2 FR-07-E2-002
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement GET (returns active matrix, optional ?line_id= for per-line override) and POST (creates new version with cells, marks active) endpoints with RBAC + audit log.

## Implementation contract
1. Route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/changeover-matrix/route.ts`: GET reads active version, optionally merging per-line override rows; POST body { matrix: [...], line_id?: string, notes? }.
2. POST: in transaction — INSERT new changeover_matrix_versions row (auto-incremented version_number), UPDATE old active is_active=false, INSERT cells, emit outbox event scheduler.changeover_matrix.updated.
3. RBAC: GET = Planner Advanced + Prod Manager (read); POST = Planner Advanced only.
4. Validation: each cell {from, to, minutes, cleaning, atp, segregation?} via Zod; segregation_required=true ONLY allowed for Admin role.

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/changeover-matrix/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/lib/scheduler/matrix-service.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/changeover-matrix/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Planner POST with valid matrix, when called, then new version row inserted, old set is_active=false, cells inserted, outbox emitted (single transaction)
2. Given GET ?line_id=LINE-03, when called, then response merges default + LINE-03 override rows (override wins per cell)
3. Given Planner POST with cell segregation_required=true, when executed, then 403 returned (Admin-only field)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/route.test.ts covering versioning + override merge + segregation-only-admin
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/changeover-matrix'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow Planner to set segregation_required=true (V-CM-04 enforced)
- Do not skip the version flip transaction (two active versions = data corruption)
- Do not skip outbox emit (audit trail mandatory per §9.8)

pipeline_inputs.description: GET (active matrix + optional per-line merge) and POST (new version + cells + outbox event) for changeover_matrix.
pipeline_inputs.details: Versioning logic: POST creates new version (version_number = MAX+1), flips is_active in single tx, inserts cells, emits outbox event. GET merges default + override when line_id query provided. Zod validation enforces V-CM-04 (segregation Admin-only).

Do not implement matrix_review_request endpoint here (T-041)
